overview: Health Package Finder is a comprehensive medical package search and RCM (Revenue Cycle Management) platform for hospitals. It covers the full revenue cycle from patient registration through claims settlement, with analytics dashboards, aging AR tracking, denial management, and workflow automation.
features: Search 3,453 medical packages with advanced filters
Full RCM workflow: Patient → Pre-Auth → Clinical Docs → Claims → Payment
RCM Analytics Dashboard with KPIs (AR, approval rate, denial rate, resolution time)
Aging AR tracker with 0-30, 30-60, 60-90, 90+ day buckets
Enhanced Denial & Rejection with appeal tracking
ICD-10 / package code validation at pre-auth stage
Masters management (Hospital, Doctor, TPA, ICD-10, Ward)
Local Data Source Manager (XLS, Word, PDF, Images)
Clinical notes generation as editable Word documents
